commonParams.style: professional food photography, 85mm lens, f/2.8, soft natural light
commonParams.composition: centered, slight angle, negative space for text overlay
commonParams.avoid: no shadows on background, no props, no hands, no text, no logos

hero-cake.prompt: Professional food photography of a stunning three-tier vanilla buttercream celebration cake decorated with fresh pink roses and mint leaves, pure white background, studio lighting, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, centered composition with space for text

custom-cake.prompt: Professional food photography of an elegant custom decorated birthday cake with pink buttercream rosettes and gold leaf accents, pure white background, studio lighting, 85mm macro lens, top-down slight angle

macarons.prompt: Professional food photography of a colorful assortment of French macarons in pink, mint green, yellow, and lavender arranged in a neat row on a pure white surface, white background, studio lighting, overhead shot, perfect symmetry

croissants.prompt: Professional food photography of three golden butter croissants stacked slightly overlapping on a pure white surface, flaky layers visible, warm golden color, pure white background, studio lighting, 85mm lens, front angle

cupcakes.prompt: Professional food photography of six beautifully frosted cupcakes in pink and vanilla buttercream with colorful sprinkles, arranged in a neat row on a pure white surface, white background, studio lighting, 85mm, bright and playful

sugar-cookies.prompt: Professional food photography of decorated royal icing sugar cookies in flower and heart shapes with pink, white, and gold icing details, arranged on a pure white surface, pure white background, studio lighting, overhead shot

baker-hands.prompt: Professional photography of a baker's hands dusted with flour working fresh dough on a marble counter, soft natural window light, warm tones, shallow depth of field focusing on the dough, lifestyle editorial style

bakery-counter.prompt: Professional interior photography of a beautiful pink-toned bakery display counter filled with colorful pastries and cakes, warm natural light through a window, shallow depth of field, lifestyle editorial style, cozy and inviting

storefront.prompt: Professional exterior photography of a charming small bakery storefront with a pink door, flower boxes, warm afternoon light, welcoming feel, ground-level shot, editorial style
